childhood.familyBackground: Lampert grew up in Miami in a middle-class family. His parents valued education and analytical thinking.
childhood.earlyLife: Lampert worked as an investor and hedge fund manager before becoming involved in retail. He purchased troubled retailer Sears and attempted to restructure the company.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 램퍼트는 투자자이자 헤지펀드 관리자로 근무한 후 소매업에 관여했다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded hedge fund and investment company
Acquired control of Sears and began restructuring efforts
careerTimeline.eventKo: Sears의 통제권 획득 및 구조 조정 시작

careerTimeline.event: Struggled with retail industry challenges as Sears faced decline
careerTimeline.eventKo: Sears가 쇠퇴함에 따라 소매 산업 도전으로 고전

failures.description: Sears faced bankruptcy and massive losses under his leadership due to poor strategic decisions
failures.descriptionKo: Sears는 그의 리더십 하에서 부실한 전략적 결정으로 인해 파산 및 대규모 손실 직면
failures.lesson: Retail transformation requires understanding modern consumer behavior and omnichannel strategy
failures.lessonKo: 소매 변환은 현대 소비자 행동 및 옴니채널 전략 이해가 필요하다

quotes.text: Investment requires discipline and contrarian thinking

recommended.title: The Intelligent Investor
recommended.author: Benjamin Graham
recommended.noteKo: 그의 역발상 투자 접근 방식을 형성함

personalTraits.knownFor: Hedge fund management; Sears restructuring attempt; contrarian investing
personalTraits.knownForKo: 헤지펀드 관리; Sears 구조 조정 시도; 역발상 투자
personalTraits.controversies: Faced criticism for Sears bankruptcy and employee severance issues
personalTraits.controversiesKo: Sears 파산 및 직원 퇴직금 문제로 인한 비판에 직면
